# Wireframes — Team Task Management

<!-- Feature: Team Task Management -->

---

## Screen 1: Sign-In Page

**Route:** `/sign-in` (unauthenticated entry point, BR10)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                             │
│                                                             │
│              ┌─────────────────────────────┐               │
│              │    Team Task Management      │               │
│              │                             │               │
│              │  ┌───────────────────────┐  │               │
│              │  │ Email                 │  │               │
│              │  │ [email input        ] │  │               │
│              │  └───────────────────────┘  │               │
│              │                             │               │
│              │  ┌───────────────────────┐  │               │
│              │  │ Password              │  │               │
│              │  │ [password input     ] │  │               │
│              │  └───────────────────────┘  │               │
│              │                             │               │
│              │  ┌───────────────────────┐  │               │
│              │  │      Sign In          │  │               │
│              │  └───────────────────────┘  │               │
│              │                             │               │
│              │  [error message if any]     │               │
│              └─────────────────────────────┘               │
│                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Notes:**
- Centered card on a neutral background
- On successful sign-in: team-member → `/tasks` (My Tasks), admin → `/tasks/all` (All Tasks) — R1, R2
- Unauthenticated access to any route redirects here — BR10
- No sign-up link (user management is out of scope)
- Authentication handled via BFF at `localhost:5120`

---

## Screen 2: My Tasks — Team-Member Home

**Route:** `/tasks` (team-member only; admin is redirected to All Tasks — R1, BR9)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │              │  │  My Tasks                                        │ │
│  │  My Tasks    │  │                                                  │ │
│  │  [active]    │  │  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐   │ │
│  │              │  │  │  All  │  Pending  │  Complete             │   │ │
│  │              │  │  └──────────────────────────────────────────┘   │ │
│  │              │  │                                                  │ │
│  │              │  │  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐   │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Title         │ Due Date   │ Status  │   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┤   │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Fix login bug │ 2026-05-01 │ Pending │   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  │               │            │ [Mark   │   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  │               │            │Complete]│   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┤   │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Write docs    │ 2026-04-20 │ Complete│   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  ├──────────────────────────────────────────┤   │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Review PR     │ 2026-04-25 │ Pending │   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  │               │            │ [Mark   │   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  │               │            │Complete]│   │   │ │
│  │              │  │  └──────────────────────────────────────────┘   │ │
│  │              │  │                                                  │ │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Empty State (R4):**
```
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  All  │  Pending  │  Complete                            │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                  │
│              No tasks assigned to you yet.                       │
```

**Error Banner (R14):**
```
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  ⚠ Unable to load tasks. Please try again.   [Retry]    │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
```

**Mark Complete in-flight (R12):**
```
│  │ Fix login bug │ 2026-05-01 │ Pending │ [⟳ Mark Complete] │   │
```

**Notes:**
- Left sidebar: `w-56`, shows only "My Tasks" for team-member role
- Status filter tabs: All / Pending / Complete — Shadcn `<Tabs>`, immediate update without page reload (R3)
- Task rows are clickable → opens Task Detail Modal (R6)
- "Mark Complete" button: only on pending tasks assigned to current user (R11)
- Once complete, "Mark Complete" control is removed (R13)
- Sidebar active item highlighted with `bg-sidebar-accent`

---

## Screen 3: All Tasks — Admin Home

**Route:** `/tasks/all` (admin only; team-member redirected silently to `/tasks` — BR9)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │              │  │  All Tasks                      [Create Task]    │ │
│  │  All Tasks   │  │                                                  │ │
│  │  [active]    │  │  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐   │ │
│  │              │  │  │  All  │  Pending  │  Complete             │   │ │
│  │              │  │  └──────────────────────────────────────────┘   │ │
│  │              │  │                                                  │ │
│  │              │  │  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────┐  │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Title      │ Assigned To │ Due  │ Status  │  │ │
│  │              │  │  ├───────────────────────────────────────────┤  │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Fix login  │ Alice Chen  │05-01 │ Pending │  │ │
│  │              │  │  ├───────────────────────────────────────────┤  │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Write docs │ Bob Torres  │04-20 │Complete │  │ │
│  │              │  │  ├───────────────────────────────────────────┤  │ │
│  │              │  │  │ Review PR  │ Alice Chen  │04-25 │ Pending │  │ │
│  │              │  │  └───────────────────────────────────────────┘  │ │
│  │              │  │                                                  │ │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Empty State (R5):**
```
│              No tasks have been created yet.                     │
```

**Error Banner (R14):**
```
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  ⚠ Unable to load tasks. Please try again.   [Retry]    │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
```

**Notes:**
- "Create Task" button: top-right of header, `justify-between` layout (R7)
- Admin task table includes "Assigned To" column (shows `assignedUser.displayName`)
- No "Mark Complete" button — admin cannot mark tasks complete (BR7)
- Task rows clickable → Task Detail Modal (R6) with Edit + Delete actions visible
- Status filter: same All / Pending / Complete tabs as My Tasks (R3)

---

## Screen 4: Task Detail Modal

**Trigger:** Clicking any task row on Screen 2 or 3 (R6)
**Component:** Shadcn `<Dialog>` — `max-w-lg`

### 4a — Team-Member View (pending, own task)

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Fix Login Bug                      [✕]  │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  Description                             │
│  The authentication flow fails when      │
│  the session token expires mid-request.  │
│                                          │
│  Due Date         Assigned To            │
│  2026-05-01       Alice Chen             │
│                                          │
│  Status                                  │
│  Pending                                 │
│                                          │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│                         [Mark Complete]  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 4b — Team-Member View (complete task)

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Write Docs                         [✕]  │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  Description                             │
│  Document the new API endpoints.         │
│                                          │
│  Due Date         Assigned To            │
│  2026-04-20       Alice Chen             │
│                                          │
│  Status                                  │
│  Complete                                │
│                                          │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│                              [Close]     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 4c — Admin View

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Fix Login Bug                      [✕]  │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  Description                             │
│  The authentication flow fails when      │
│  the session token expires.              │
│                                          │
│  Due Date         Assigned To            │
│  2026-05-01       Alice Chen             │
│                                          │
│  Status                                  │
│  Pending                                 │
│                                          │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  [Delete]                       [Edit]   │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Notes:**
- Dialog manages focus trapping automatically (Shadcn)
- Description section hidden if `description` is null/empty (BR2)
- "Mark Complete" only if: role = team-member AND task.status = pending AND task.assignedUserId = currentUser.id (R11, BR6)
- Admin sees Edit + Delete buttons; Edit opens Edit Task Modal (Screen 6); Delete triggers Delete Confirmation (Screen 7)
- "Mark Complete" in-flight: button disabled with Lucide `Loader2` spinner (R12)

---

## Screen 5: Create Task Modal

**Trigger:** "Create Task" button on All Tasks (admin only — R7)
**Component:** Shadcn `<Dialog>` — `max-w-lg`

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Create Task                        [✕]  │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  Title *                                 │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Enter task title                   │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  [validation message if invalid]         │
│                                          │
│  Description                             │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │                                    │  │
│  │ (optional)                         │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                          │
│  Due Date *                              │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ YYYY-MM-DD                         │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  [validation message if missing]         │
│                                          │
│  Assigned User *                         │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Select a team member        [▾]    │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  [validation message if not selected]    │
│                                          │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  [Cancel]                  [Create Task] │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Success state (R8):**
```
┌─── Toast (bottom-right) ──────────────┐
│  ✓  Task created successfully.        │
└───────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Error state (API failure):**
```
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │  ⚠ Unable to create task. Please try again.           │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
```

**Notes:**
- Required fields marked with `*`
- Title: max 200 chars, required — BR1
- Description: optional, no character limit — BR2
- Due Date: required — BR3
- Assigned User: Shadcn `<Select>` populated from `GET /users`; free-text entry not permitted — BR4
- On success: modal closes, toast shown, list refreshes — R8
- Inline validation shown below each field — `text-destructive text-sm`

---

## Screen 6: Edit Task Modal

**Trigger:** "Edit" button inside Task Detail Modal (admin only — R9)
**Component:** Inline mode switch within the same Shadcn `<Dialog>` (view → edit toggle)

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Edit Task                          [✕]  │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  Title *                                 │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Fix Login Bug                      │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  [validation message if invalid]         │
│                                          │
│  Description                             │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ The authentication flow fails...   │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                          │
│  Due Date *                              │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ 2026-05-01                         │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  [validation message if missing]         │
│                                          │
│  Assigned User                           │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Alice Chen                  [🔒]   │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  (Assigned user cannot be changed)       │
│                                          │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  [Cancel]                [Save Changes]  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Notes:**
- Fields pre-populated with current task values
- Assigned User field is disabled/locked — BR5; shown with lock indicator and helper text
- Same inline validation as Create Task form — BR1, BR3
- On save success: dialog returns to view mode showing updated values
- On save failure: error message shown within dialog; original values preserved
- "Cancel" returns to Task Detail view mode without API call

---

## Screen 7: Delete Confirmation AlertDialog

**Trigger:** "Delete" button inside Task Detail Modal (admin only — R10)
**Component:** Shadcn `<AlertDialog>` (separate from Task Detail Dialog)

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Delete this task?                       │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│                                          │
│  This cannot be undone.                  │
│                                          │
│──────────────────────────────────────────│
│  [Cancel]                    [Delete]    │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Notes:**
- Exact copy from FRS R10: "Delete this task? This cannot be undone."
- "Delete" button styled with `variant="destructive"` (Shadcn)
- On confirm: API call `DELETE /tasks/{taskId}` → on success: both dialogs close, task removed from list
- On cancel: AlertDialog dismisses, user returns to Task Detail Modal
- On API failure: error message shown, task remains in list
- AlertDialog manages its own focus trapping

---

## Layout Shell Reference

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │  w-56        │  │  Main Content Area (max-w-5xl, mx-auto, px-4 py-6│ │
│  │  bg-sidebar  │  │                                                  │ │
│  │              │  │  [Page Header: title + optional action button]   │ │
│  │  Navigation: │  │                                                  │ │
│  │              │  │  [Filter Tabs / Controls]                        │ │
│  │  My Tasks    │  │                                                  │ │
│  │  (team-mbr)  │  │  [Primary Content — table / modal / empty state] │ │
│  │              │  │                                                  │ │
│  │  All Tasks   │  │                                                  │ │
│  │  (admin)     │  │                                                  │ │
│  │              │  │                                                  │ │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Grid:** `grid-cols-[224px_1fr]` at root layout
**Sidebar active item:** `bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-primary`
**Modals:** rendered as portals, overlaid on top of the shell
**Target viewport:** `min-width: 1024px` — desktop only in v1
